# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

type JsonBody = {
  content?: unknown;
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
  status?: number;
  chunks?: unknown[];
  delayMs?: number;
};

const encoder = new TextEncoder();

function normalizeHeaders(input?: Record<string, string>) {
  const headers = new Headers();

  headers.set('content-type', 'text/plain; charset=utf-8');
  headers.set('cache-control', 'no-store');

  if (!input) return headers;

  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(input)) {
    try {
      if (typeof key === 'string' && typeof value === 'string') {
        headers.set(key, value);
      }
    } catch {}
  }

  return headers;
}

function toChunk(value: unknown): string {
  if (typeof value === 'string') return value;
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return '';
  if (typeof value === 'object') return JSON.stringify(value);
  return String(value);
}

function sleep(ms: number) {
  return new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return new Response('Method Not Allowed', {
      status: 405,
      headers: {
        allow: 'POST',
        'content-type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',
      },
    });
  }

  let body: JsonBody;

  try {
    body = (await req.json()) as JsonBody;
  } catch {
    return new Response('Invalid JSON body', {
      status: 400,
      headers: { 'content-type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8' },
    });
  }

  const headers = normalizeHeaders(body.headers);
  const status =
    typeof body.status === 'number' && body.status >= 100 && body.status <= 599
      ? body.status
      : 200;

  const chunks =
    Array.isArray(body.chunks) && body.chunks.length > 0
      ? body.chunks.map(toChunk)
      : [toChunk(body.content)];

  const delayMs =
    typeof body.delayMs === 'number' && body.delayMs > 0 ? body.delayMs : 0;

  const stream = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
    async start(controller) {
      try {
        for (const chunk of chunks) {
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(chunk));
          if (delayMs > 0) await sleep(delayMs);
        }
      } finally {
        controller.close();
      }
    },
  });

  return new Response(stream, {
    status,
    headers,
  });
}
